name: demo-math
description: Demo math plugin — basic math tools and sample data for testing the Mentor plugin system.
author: Mentor Team
guidelines: Use this plugin when the user needs basic mathematical operations: solving quadratic equations or computing descriptive statistics. This is a demo plugin — its tools serve as examples of the plugin interface. Always explain results clearly to the user.

tools.name: quadratic_solver
tools.description: Solve quadratic equation ax^2 + bx + c = 0. Returns real roots (may be 0, 1, or 2).
tools.guidelines: Use when user provides coefficients a, b, c for a quadratic equation. Warn the user when discriminant is negative (no real roots).

tools.name: statistics
tools.description: Compute basic descriptive statistics for a list of numbers: count, mean, std, min, max, median.
tools.guidelines: Use when user asks for statistical summary of a dataset. The data must be a list of numbers. Results include count, mean, standard deviation, min, max, and median.

data.name: sample_measurements
data.description: Generate synthetic measurement data from a normal distribution with given parameters.
data.guidelines: Use this when you need test data with known statistical properties. Default: n=100, mean=0, std=1. The data is generated in-memory (no disk I/O).

returns.description: Array of shape (n,) with float64 values

data.name: csv_data
data.description: Parse a CSV file from a local path and return as structured data.
data.guidelines: Use when the user mentions a CSV file on disk. The loader reads the file using numpy.genfromtxt. The file must exist at the given path.

filepath.description: Absolute path to the CSV file
